parameters.query:
SELECT
  t.ticker,
  t.buy_price,
  t.sell_price,
  t.quantity,
  t.pnl_amount,
  t.pnl_pct,
  t.outcome,
  t.feedback_tags,
  t.notes,
  t.session_date,
  s.confidence,
  s.type as signal_type,
  s.reasoning,
  s.risk_level
FROM trades t
LEFT JOIN signals s ON t.signal_id = s.id
WHERE t.session_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'
ORDER BY t.session_date DESC
LIMIT 50
